fieldValues.value: Should Phase 1 cover the full stairwell including the main hallway, or just the back stairs and landings?

The back stairs have a large amount of wall space across multiple landings. The main hallway was also discussed as a potential exhibition space, but adding it in Phase 1 would significantly increase the scope of the first experiment.
Taking on too much in Phase 1 risks overextending the group's capacity before the mounting system and workflow have been tested.
Including the main hallway in Phase 1. Deferred to Phase 2.
Phase 1 covers the back stairs and landings only. The main hallway is explicitly deferred to Phase 2, contingent on Phase 1 working well.
Starting smaller allows the group to test the mounting system, workflow, and artist relations before expanding. The main hallway is more visible and involves more parties.
December 2026 pilot review — if Phase 1 is working, bring main hallway into scope for Phase 2.
